sections.title: Injury Free Workplace Plan Acknowledgment
sections.html:
Injury Free Workplace Plan Acknowledgment

MH Construction is committed to maintaining an injury-free workplace. This commitment requires active participation from all employees in identifying and mitigating hazards. Adherence to established safety protocols is mandatory to ensure the well-being of every individual on site. Regular training and communication are integral to fostering a culture of safety and preventing incidents. All personnel are expected to report unsafe conditions and contribute to a secure working environment.

I acknowledge that I have read, understand, and agree to comply with the MH Construction Injury Free Workplace Plan Policy as required by OSHA: 29 CFR 1926.20(b) General Safety and Health Provisions and WISHA: WAC 296-155-100 Management"s Responsibility; WAC 296-155-110 Accident Prevention Program.
